---
lightbox: true
---

<style>
.quarto-figure img, .lightbox img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 200px;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center 30%;
}
</style>

::: {.column-screen-inset}

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![](media/gallery/img3.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](./media/gallery/flight.png){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/benjamin.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/crash.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/drone1.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/drone2.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/drone_report_images/fig8_zone1_predictions.png){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/drone3.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/drone4.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/drone5.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/drone_report_images/fig9_zone2_predictions.png){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/drone6.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](./media/gallery/drone.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img1.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img2.jpg){group="my-gallery"}


![](media/gallery/img4.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/drone_report_images/fig6_test_area3.png){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img5.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/drone_report_images/fig4_test_area.png){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img6.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img7.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img8.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img9.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img10.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img11.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img12.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img13.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/drone_report_images/fig7_annotated_areas.png){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img14.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img15.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img16.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img17.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img18.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img19.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img20.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img21.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img22.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img23.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img24.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img25.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img26.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img27.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img28.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img29.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img30.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img31.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img32.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img33.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img34.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img35.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img36.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img37.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img38.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img39.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img40.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img41.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img42.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img43.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img44.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img45.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img46.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img47.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img48.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img49.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img50.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/img51.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/landscape1.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/landscape2.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/prep1.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/prep2.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/prep3.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/train1.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/train2.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/walk1.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/gallery/walk2.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

:::

:::
